review: love the fact I don't even have to get out of my car and my food is brought right to my car.

this app has some failures because when I'm trying to use my points to get more it says "I'm sorry we can't do that because you don't have enough points" but I'm literally trying to get more points. and the thing is everyone else can put their points in but it's just me that can't I've tried deleting it but it still doesn't work
